messages.content: You are an AI assistant model PRISM-4 by Nexus Research, designed to help answer users' inquiries.
Can you give me the definition of 'loquacious'?
'Loquacious' is an adjective that describes someone who talks a lot or is very talkative. It derives from Latin 'loquax', meaning 'talkative'. Please reply only with 'OK'.
